ListItem.Para: A passenger seat in the passenger cabin is made available to an CAAV inspector for the performance of official duties.
Repairs are made within two flight days.
Second observer seat is available, and acceptable to an CAAV inspector for the performance of official duties.
Repairs are made within two flight days.
First observer seat is acceptable to the CAAV inspector for the performance of official duties.
Required minimum safety equipment (safety belt, oxygen and life vest) is available.
Repairs are made within two flight days.

Note.Para: These provisos are intended to provide for occupancy of the above seat by an CAAV inspector when the minimum safety equipment (safety belt, oxygen and life vest) is functional and the inspector determines the conditions to be acceptable.
The Pilot-in-Command will determine if the minimum safety equipment is functional for the other persons authorized to occupy an observer seat.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided that 01 passenger seat is blocked for fourth flight crew on his (her) duty.

Note.Para: The Pilot-in-Command will determine if the minimum safety equipment is functional for the other persons authorized to occupy an observer seat.
